passedAssertions: VAL-RECENCY-001: Recent Match Boost - Candidates with lastMatchedAt within 30 days receive score boost
VAL-RECENCY-002: Stale Candidate Penalty - Candidates with no matches in 60+ days receive penalty
VAL-RECENCY-003: Null LastMatchedAt Handling - Null timestamps result in neutral recency scoring
VAL-RECENCY-004: Configurable Decay Parameters - Recency decay periods configurable via env vars
VAL-RECENCY-005: Score Capping - Final score stays within 0-100 range
VAL-RECENCY-006: Recency in Reasoning - Match reasoning includes recency factor explanation
notes: All 6 recency-scoring assertions validated through unit tests. Tests cover computeRecencyScore function (8 tests), computeMatchScore integration (10 tests), and RECENCY_CONFIG environment variables (2 tests). Quality signals and dynamic weight support features are not yet implemented (pending status in features.json).
